item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 190730Z AUTO 18007KT 9999 SCT013 BKN023 BKN028 13/11 Q1017 TEMPO 4500 -RADZ BKN009
🟡 TAF LFOT 190500Z 1906/2006 18008KT CAVOK TEMPO 1906/1920 -RA PROB40 TEMPO 1906/1915 BKN014 PROB30 TEMPO 1906/1911 4500 -RADZ BKN009 TEMPO 1912/1918 22015G25KT
